JUDGE PRO TEM: THOMAS ACKLEY; CLERK: MARIA SANCHEZ; SETTLED PER STIPULATED JUDGMENT. NOT RECORDED, OFF RECORD. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ATTORNEY ARNOLD AVJE II PRESENT FOR PLTF. DEFT JOSEPH ROBBINS PRESENT IN PRO PER. STIPULATED JUDGMENT AS FOLLOWS: PLTF WILL HAVE JUDGMENT FOR IMMEDIATE POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 364 EDDY STREET, #418, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIF. LEASE FORFEITED.IMMEDIATE WRIT OF POSSESSION FOR THE ABOVE. PLTF WILL STAY EXECUTION OF WRIT IF DEFT VACATES ON OR BEFORE 5:00PM, JULY 4, 2000. IF DEFT DOES NOT VACATE BY THAT DATE AND TIME, THE WRIT WILL BE EXECUTED IMMEDIATELY WITH NO FURTHER STAYS.
